goal: carry native aspect colors into world renderers for essentia jars and aura nodes
implemented: AspectVisuals helper added for dominant and blended native aspect colors.
AuraNodeRenderer now uses blended native color from node aspects instead of fixed purple only.
Special aura node types keep a secondary type tint overlay.
EssentiaJarBlockEntity exposes storedAspect, amount, capacity and fillRatio using its existing AspectList storage.
EssentiaJarRenderer added with translucent native-colored liquid fill.
essentia_fill.png added as neutral white fill mask tinted by native aspect color.
Essentia jar chat messages now use native aspect TextColor.
not_yet_final: The jar fill renderer is a 1.19.2 renderer bridge, not exact TC4 TESR liquid wobble.
Need exact glass transparency render layer setup for all jar block variants.
Need full essentia transport, alembic and tube behavior pass.
Aura node still needs exact TC4 nodes.png layer math and richer live client sync.
